title: Kudrjaschevia jacubii

The classification of Kudrjaschevia jacubii is further refined into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Asia. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
